added.6nRCFl: You may {also, select, true {also } other {}}be sharing activity from {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} you play{nameCount, plural, =0 {} one {, including **{game1}**} other {, including **{game1}** and **{game2}**}}. Restrict sharing on a game-by-game basis.
added.Mf0720: Looking for per-server controls? Navigate to the server, select the dropdown menu next to the server name, then select $[**Privacy Settings**](privacySettingsHook). From there, you can toggle on or off Activity Joining for just that server.
added.OYYY6q: Control who sees activity information from games and connected apps I use.
added.uGDpgH: Some games allow users to join the game you're playing when viewing your activity.
